revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''2-1-455

A colorimetric illuminant, the spectral energy distribution of which is specified by the C.I.E., with various scientific applications in view.

Reference: C.I.E. (modified)


Note: For further details, see Reference: C.I.E.

{{IALAFooter}}
